prompt: Create a collaborative coding environment screenshot using the split editor view from the first image and the coding theme from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a modern coding environment, reflecting a setup suitable for collaboration. Incorporate the three-panel split editor view from image 1, featuring a file explorer on the far left, a primary code editor in the center, and a narrower secondary editor pane to its right. The coding theme from image 2 should be applied throughout, characterized by a light background for all editor and sidebar areas, dark text, and syntax highlighting (e.g., blue/purple for keywords, orange/red for strings, green for comments) consistent with image 2. All user interface elements, including tabs and the status bar, should adhere to this light theme.
objects: File explorer on the far left panel
Primary code editor in the center panel
Narrower secondary editor pane to its right panel
Light background for all editor and sidebar areas
Syntax highlighting (blue/purple for keywords, orange/red for strings, green for comments)
